creator: cm@marblenix.com
text:
(In reply to Peter Wemm from comment #5)


I am/was using pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org

I can confirm that as of this morning (July 30th) I am seeing the mysql57 -client and -server packages. 

mysql57-client-5.7.19_1.txz	1906644	2017-Jul-27 01:16
mysql57-server-5.7.19_1.txz	14153944	2017-Jul-27 02:04

I fetched this data from the following link

http://pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:amd64/quarterly/All/

I am also able to pkg upgrade the mysql -client and -server packages on the affected servers. (One local, one on AWS).
